title: MVP Scope Guardian -- Sidecar Scope File
description: Locked MVP scope for a single project. Lives at solo-dev-suite/profiles/<slug>.scope.json alongside the main profile. Owned and written exclusively by scope_tool.py.

schema_version.description: Bump when the sidecar shape changes in a breaking way. Pair with a migration in scope_tool.py.

project_slug.description: Must match the project_slug in the main profile. Sanity check to catch cross-wired sidecars.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the initial lock. Never modified after.

last_rendered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last Markdown render. Used to detect stale docs.

buckets.description: The four-bucket split. All four arrays are always present, even if empty.

launch_blocking.description: Features required for launch. If it's not in here, it's not in the MVP. Period.

id.description: Stable identifier, e.g. LB01. Assigned by scope_tool.py.

effort.description: S=<1 day, M=1-3 days, L=1-2 weeks, XL=2+ weeks.

impact.description: How much this feature moves the needle for target user on launch day.

rationale.description: Why this is launch-blocking, not post-launch. Force the author to defend the placement.

post_launch_v1.description: Features committed to the first post-launch wave (typically first 60 days). Explicit promise, not a vague maybe.

target_wave.description: Which post-launch wave this is targeted for (e.g. 'v1.1', 'Q3 2026', 'first 30 days').

parking_lot.description: Good ideas that are neither blocking nor promised. 60% of the original feature list ends up here -- that's normal and healthy.

added_at.description: When this was added. Useful for pruning stale ideas.

wont_build.description: The MOST IMPORTANT bucket. Explicit NOs with recorded rationale. Future scope creep attempts will be compared against this list.

reason.description: Why we're saying no. This text will surface when future creep-check matches this item.

rescope_history.description: Ordered log of scope changes after initial lock. Append-only.

change.description: Human-readable description of what moved where.

reason.description: The justification. Used to detect patterns of creep disguised as rescope.
